name: Registering Intellectual Property
description: Registering intellectual property, such as copyrights and trademarks, can help protect a web designer's unique content and prevent theft. This can be done through government agencies or online services.
when_to_apply: Before launching a website or creating unique content
example: Registering a copyright for a website's design and content
anti_pattern: Not registering intellectual property, making it difficult to prove ownership and prevent theft

name: Using Copyright Notices
description: Using copyright notices, such as the symbol, can help deter copyright infringement and provide notice to potential infringers. This can be done by including the notice on the website or in the website's code.
when_to_apply: When creating a website or unique content
example: Including a copyright notice at the bottom of a website
anti_pattern: Not using copyright notices, making it easier for infringers to claim they did not know the content was copyrighted
